title: Web Data, Fetch, Storage, and Security Boundaries · Language Lens: Xss Injection
summary: Load and cache public service data while handling hostile input, offline states, privacy, and response failures. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js xss injection increment in a resilient privacy-aware service-data client. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Keep untrusted data in text or validated structured sinks and avoid dynamic code or unsafe markup construction.
Choose memory, sessionStorage, localStorage, Cache, or IndexedDB from size, lifetime, concurrency, privacy, and transaction needs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
